columns.title: Backlog
columns.description: Planned work we intend to build.

items.title: AI auto-complete
items.description: Inline completions while writing notes and prompt templates.

items.title: AI chat
items.description: Conversational interface for searching and managing content.

items.title: OAuth for MCP
items.description: Connect MCP clients like ChatGPT without personal access tokens.

items.title: Data export
items.description: Export all your content in standard formats.

items.title: Safari extension
items.description: Save and search bookmarks directly from Safari.

items.title: Image support
items.description: Attach images to bookmarks and notes.

items.title: Multi-select actions
items.description: Bulk tag, archive, or delete multiple items at once.

items.title: Content encryption
items.description: End-to-end encryption for sensitive content.

items.title: Semantic search
items.description: Vector-based search using embeddings for meaning-aware content discovery.

items.title: Mobile app
items.description: Native mobile experience backed by the existing API.

items.title: Antigravity MCP support
items.description: Connect Google Antigravity (the agy CLI and IDE) to your content via `tiddly mcp configure antigravity`.

items.title: Tips catalog & command palette discovery
items.description: Browse a curated tips catalog at /docs/tips, and find tips, docs pages, and settings from the command palette by concept — not just literal name.

items.title: Chrome extension keyboard shortcut
items.description: Open the extension with Option+Shift+S (Mac) or Alt+Shift+S (Windows/Linux); rebindable in Chrome.

items.title: AI-powered suggestions
items.description: Tag, metadata, relationship, and prompt argument suggestions powered by AI. Includes BYOK support and per-use-case configuration.

items.title: Tiddly CLI
items.description: Command-line tool for configuring MCP servers and syncing agent skills.

items.title: Public docs site
items.description: AI integration guides, content types, search, versioning, and keyboard shortcuts.

items.title: Keyboard navigation
items.description: Arrow keys to navigate content lists, Enter to open.

items.title: PAT rename
items.description: Rename Personal Access Tokens from the settings page.

items.title: Chrome extension
items.description: Save and search bookmarks from any page.

items.title: Content versioning
items.description: Full history with diffs and one-click restore.

items.title: Full-text search
items.description: Search across all content with command palette.

items.title: Content relationships
items.description: Link related bookmarks, notes, and prompts together.

items.title: Keyboard shortcuts & command palette
items.description: Slash commands, editor palette, and global shortcuts.

items.title: Rich markdown editor
items.description: WYSIWYG editing with syntax highlighting and keyboard shortcuts.

items.title: Filters & Collections
items.description: Saved tag-based views for organizing content.

items.title: Agent Skills export
items.description: Export prompts for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and Codex.

items.title: MCP integration
items.description: AI assistant access to bookmarks, notes, and prompts.

items.title: First commit
items.description: Bookmarks, notes, prompt templates, tags, and API access.

ideas.title: Chrome extension editing
ideas.description: Edit bookmarks and notes directly from the extension popup.

ideas.title: Integrations
ideas.description: Google Docs, Confluence, and other third-party connections.
